services.name: Storage Account
services.description: Retains original source documents and processed outputs

services.name: Azure Functions
services.description: Orchestrates document ingestion, OCR, summarization, and indexing

services.name: Document Intelligence
services.description: Extracts text and structure from uploaded documents

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.description: Summarizes extracted document content into concise insights

services.name: Key Vault
services.description: Stores API keys and secrets for downstream AI and search services

services.name: Azure Cognitive Search
services.description: Indexes extracted text and summaries for retrieval

services.name: Azure Cosmos DB
services.description: Stores document metadata, processing state, and references

services.name: Azure Monitor
services.description: Collects operational telemetry from the processing workflow

services.name: Log Analytics
services.description: Centralizes logs and supports troubleshooting queries

connections.label: Trigger processing when a new document is uploaded
Retrieve secrets and service credentials for the pipeline
Submit document for OCR and structured extraction
Return extracted text, tables, and layout metadata
Send extracted content for concise summarization
Return generated summary and key points
Push enriched document content into the search index
Persist metadata, document status, and processing results
Emit pipeline metrics, traces, and failure events
Stream telemetry into centralized log retention and query workspace

workflow.description: A user uploads a document into blob storage, which starts the processing pipeline.
Azure Functions retrieves secrets from Key Vault and submits the document to Document Intelligence for OCR and structure extraction.
Document Intelligence returns extracted text and layout data to Azure Functions for enrichment.
Azure Functions sends the extracted content to Azure OpenAI to generate a concise summary and key points.
Azure Functions stores the document summary and extracted fields in Azure Cosmos DB as durable metadata.
Azure Functions publishes the enriched text and summary to Azure Cognitive Search for indexing and retrieval.
Azure Functions emits operational telemetry to Azure Monitor, which forwards logs to Log Analytics for investigation.

metadata.prompt: An intelligent document processing pipeline with Azure AI Document Intelligence for OCR, Azure OpenAI for summarization, Cognitive Search for indexing, Cosmos DB for metadata, and Blob Storage for document retention
